summary: ExpenseX - A fully functional financial management app with secure login, multi-account management, transactions/records system, category management, budget management, analytics/reports, and settings. Features a clean Green/Blue finance theme with dark mode, bottom navigation bar, and responsive design.
architectural_notes: Green/Blue clean finance theme with dark mode support
Bottom navigation bar layout: Home | Records | Add(+) | Analysis | Accounts
Currency defaults to ₹ (Indian Rupee); language supports English and Hindi
known_issues: Previous build attempts failed due to feature complexity — current attempt is a simplified but complete version
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- ExpenseX app logo — a modern minimal icon with a stylized 'X' inside a rounded square, green-to-teal gradient background, white foreground mark (expensex-logo.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity-based secure login. Unauthenticated users see a login screen; authenticated users see the main app. Store each user's data scoped to their principal.

Implement multi-account management. Support account types: Cash, Bank Account, UPI, Credit Card, and Custom. Each account stores a name, type, and running balance. Users can add a new account, delete an account, view its balance, and transfer money between two accounts (which creates a Transfer transaction).

Implement a Transactions/Records system. Each transaction has a type (Income, Expense, or Transfer), an account, a category, an amount, and a date/time. Support: add transaction, delete transaction, search transactions by keyword, filter by date range / category / account, and sort by amount or date ascending/descending.

Implement Category Management. Pre-populate default categories: Food, Travel, Shopping, Rent, Salary, Bills, EMI, Entertainment, Health, Other. Users can add custom categories, edit existing category names, and delete categories.

Implement Budget Management. Users can set an overall monthly budget and per-category monthly budgets. Display remaining budget and percentage used for the current month. Show a warning when 80% of a budget is consumed, and a red alert when a budget is exceeded.

Implement an Analysis & Reports screen with a dashboard summary (Total Balance, Total Income, Total Expense), a monthly overview bar chart (income vs expense per month), a pie chart for category-wise expenses, a line graph for spending trend over time, and a weekly/monthly/yearly filter. Include a button to download a simple PDF report of transactions.

Implement a Settings screen with: currency selection (default ₹ INR) from a list of common currencies, and language toggle between English and Hindi. The selected currency symbol must appear throughout the app wherever amounts are displayed.

Implement a bottom navigation bar with five tabs: Home, Records, Add (a prominent center '+' FAB button that opens the add-transaction modal), Analysis, and Accounts. Navigation must be responsive and work on both mobile and desktop widths.

Apply a clean finance-themed visual design using a Green and Teal/Blue color palette with dark mode support, smooth CSS/Framer-style transitions on page and modal changes, and a fully responsive layout optimized for mobile-first use.

new_feature_requests.summary: Accounts Management (Cash, Bank, UPI, Credit Card, Custom) with add/delete/balance/transfer
Records/Transactions system with Income/Expense/Transfer, category, amount, date/time, delete, search, filter, sort
Category Management with defaults and custom add/edit/delete
Budget Management with monthly/category budgets, remaining/percentage display, 80% warning and exceeded alerts
Analysis & Reports with dashboard totals, pie/bar/line charts, weekly/monthly/yearly filter, PDF download and share
Bottom Navigation Bar (Home, Records, Add+, Analysis, Accounts) with Green/Blue theme, dark mode, smooth animations, responsive design
Settings page with currency selection (₹ default) and language (English/Hindi)
